january_male.outfit: Sharp, professional attire with bold colors
january_male.case_study: John, a January male, walked into the room commanding attention without saying a word. His presence alone shifted the energy. Most people try too hard to impress him—but he's already seen through that. The key? Show your own ambition without competing...
january_male.dating_ideas: Exclusive rooftop dinner, private art gallery tour
january_male.keep_spark: Challenge him intellectually, show your own ambitions
january_male.after_breakup: Give space, then reconnect with something impressive

january_female.case_study: Sarah never waited for opportunities—she created them. That's what makes January women magnetic. She doesn't chase; she attracts. Most people make the mistake of trying to win her over with grand gestures. Instead, match her energy...
january_female.keep_spark: Maintain your independence, surprise her with grand gestures
january_female.after_breakup: Show growth, make her wonder what she's missing

february_male.case_study: Mark could read people like books. One conversation and he knew exactly what you were thinking. This is where most people fail—they try to impress him with surface-level chat. But he craves depth. Ask him about his latest obsession...
february_male.keep_spark: Engage in deep conversations, respect his need for solitude
february_male.after_breakup: Intellectual reconnection, share something profound you learned

february_female.case_study: Emma had this way of making you feel like you were the only person in the world. She doesn't reveal everything at once—that's her secret. Most people rush to know her, but patience is the key...
february_female.dating_ideas: Private poetry reading, sunset boat ride
february_female.keep_spark: Create magical moments, write her poetry
february_female.after_breakup: Send something deeply personal, remind her of your connection

march_male.case_study: Jake said yes to everything. Skydiving? Sure. Road trip at midnight? Let's go. He lives for the thrill. Most people try to plan perfect dates, but spontaneity wins him every time...
march_male.keep_spark: Plan spontaneous activities, never let things get stale
march_male.after_breakup: Invite on an exciting adventure, show you're still fun

march_female.case_study: Lily couldn't be caged. The more you tried, the faster she'd run. She needs someone who understands that love isn't ownership—it's partnership. Give her wings, and she'll always come back...
march_female.keep_spark: Give her space, join her adventures
march_female.after_breakup: Show you've embraced freedom too, no pressure

april_male.case_study: David built three companies before 30. Success wasn't luck—it was relentless drive. He respects hustle above all else. Most people are intimidated by him, but he wants an equal, not a fan...
april_male.dating_ideas: Private chef experience, luxury car test drive
april_male.keep_spark: Celebrate wins together, maintain your own success
april_male.after_breakup: Showcase your achievements, make her curious

april_female.case_study: Jessica lit up every room. People naturally gravitated toward her energy. She thrives on admiration but despises desperation. Make her feel special without putting her on a pedestal...
april_female.keep_spark: Keep up appearances, plan photo-worthy dates
april_female.after_breakup: Level up your look, let her see your transformation

may_male.case_study: Michael remembered every detail. Your favorite flower, how you take your coffee. He shows love through acts of service. Most people miss this—they want words, but his language is action...
may_male.after_breakup: Remind him of intimate memories, show you care

may_female.case_study: Anna made everyone feel at home. Her presence was like a warm embrace. She gives endlessly, but this is where people fail—they take her for granted. Appreciation is everything...
may_female.keep_spark: Appreciate her efforts, create rituals together
may_female.after_breakup: Acknowledge what you lost, show genuine change

june_male.case_study: Chris could talk to anyone about anything. He made strangers feel like old friends. Connection is his drug. Most people stay surface-level, but he craves authentic exchanges...
june_male.keep_spark: Keep conversations flowing, introduce new people
june_male.after_breakup: Reach out with humor, remind him of good times

june_female.case_study: Sophie knew everyone. Her phone buzzed constantly with invitations. She thrives on social energy. Most people try to keep her to themselves—that's the mistake. Join her world...
june_female.keep_spark: Expand social circle, attend events together
june_female.after_breakup: Show you're thriving socially, FOMO is real

july_male.case_study: James would move mountains for the people he loves. His loyalty runs deep. Most people don't realize how much he observes before committing. Once you're in, you're family...
july_male.keep_spark: Show loyalty, include him in family matters
july_male.after_breakup: Respect his need for closure, be honest

july_female.case_study: Rachel feels everything deeply. She's the friend everyone cries to. This is her superpower—and her vulnerability. Most people drain her emotionally without giving back...
july_female.dating_ideas: Volunteer together, quiet dinner at home
july_female.after_breakup: Give her time to process, don't rush

august_male.case_study: Marcus was born to lead. He doesn't ask for permission—he takes charge. Most people either submit or compete. The sweet spot? Be his worthy partner...
august_male.keep_spark: Admire his strength, challenge him playfully

august_female.case_study: Victoria commands rooms without speaking. She knows her worth and won't settle. Most people are intimidated or try too hard. Match her confidence...
august_female.keep_spark: Treat her like royalty, never take her for granted
august_female.after_breakup: Level up dramatically, show you can thrive without her

september_male.case_study: Alex notices everything. The typo in your message, the slight change in tone. He analyzes to understand. Most people find this overwhelming, but it's how he shows care...
september_male.keep_spark: Respect his systems, appreciate his attention to detail
september_male.after_breakup: Give logical reasons, avoid emotional manipulation

september_female.case_study: Natalie has standards—for herself and others. She's not high-maintenance; she's high-value. Most people call her picky, but she knows what she wants...

october_male.case_study: Daniel sees all sides of every situation. He's the peacemaker. Most people mistake his diplomacy for weakness—but it's strategic. He avoids drama because he can read it coming...

october_female.case_study: Olivia brings peace wherever she goes. She hates conflict but will fight for justice. Most people think she's passive, but she chooses her battles wisely...

november_male.case_study: Ryan sees through facades instantly. He's drawn to the hidden depths in people. Most people wear masks around him—he finds it amusing. Be real, and you'll fascinate him...

november_female.case_study: Jasmine pulls people in without trying. She embodies mystery. Most people try to figure her out—that's impossible. Let her reveal herself at her pace...

december_male.case_study: Tom sees possibilities everywhere. He's the friend who convinces you to book that flight. Most people get stuck in routine—he breaks free. Adventure is his love language...
december_male.after_breakup: Stay friendly, leave door open for friendship

december_female.case_study: Maya collects experiences, not things. She's been everywhere and nowhere is home. Most people try to pin her down—that's the fastest way to lose her...
december_female.after_breakup: Part as friends, the world is small

videos.title: If his birthday is June… watch this
Never do this to this type

ai_prompts.first_message: Generate 3 compelling first messages for a {personality_type} based on their interests in {topics}. Keep them short, intriguing, and copy-ready.
ai_prompts.next_reply: Suggest 3 natural follow-up responses after '{last_message}' for a {personality_type}. Consider their turn-offs: {turn_off}.
ai_prompts.distance_reason: Analyze why a {personality_type} might become distant. Provide 3 specific reasons and 3 actionable solutions.
ai_prompts.attraction_tips: Give 5 proven attraction strategies specifically for a {personality_type}. Include psychological triggers and practical examples.
